description: A deeply-nested probe under the tolerated top-level ext bag brings the whole JSON document to exactly 128 nesting levels.
notes: Verifier MUST accept. The probe lives in the unsigned ext bag (the only tolerated unknown top-level surface), and the shared raw-JSON scanner allows 128 nested arrays/objects including the receipt root and rejects the 129th; this catches off-by-one differences between language runtimes.
